_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Thetha umhlobo, ube ungene.
speakFriend.description: I-Liana Banyan yakhiwe ukuba ivuleke kulo naliphi na ulwimi. Ulwimi ngalunye oluvuliweyo lunomvuzo omnye woguqulelo.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Uluhlu lwezilwimi nezinga le-Marks lixeshekile. I-Marks yitokeni yokuthatha inxaxheba, hayi izabelo.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Guqulela i-Liana Banyan kwi-{{language}}. Fumana {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Igama ngalinye kule platform ilinikezwe igama ngezizathu. Imvelaphi yamagama angama-26 abalulekileyo.
speakFriend.step2Body: Guqulela izicatshulwa zonke ezidinwayo. Thumela nge-Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Emva kokamkelwa, ufumana Marks kwaye ubhalwa kwi-IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Thi umhlobo, uze ungene."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sebenzisa amagama aphasiwedhi ezilwimi ezahlukeneyo eMnyango kaDurin ukuvula amava amahlanu!
